allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['competencies']; print\('competencies:', [x['competencyId'] for x in c]\); print\('mcq per comp:', len\(c[0]['mcq']\)\); print\('leak correctOptionId?', 'correctOptionId' in json.dumps\(d\)\); print\('leak rubric?', 'rubric' in json.dumps\(d\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['competencies']; print\('competencies:', [x['competencyId'] for x in c]\); print\('mcq per comp:', len\(c[0]['mcq']\)\); print\('open prompt present:', 'prompt' in c[0]['open']\); raw=json.dumps\(d\); print\('leak correctOptionId?', 'correctOptionId' in raw\); print\('leak rubric?', 'rubric' in raw\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('LOGIN OK, got access_token' if d.get\('access_token'\) else 'LOGIN FAILED:', {k:d[k] for k in d if k in \('error','error_description','msg','access_token','token_type'\)} if not d.get\('access_token'\) else ''\)")
